title: Alpha Health System
description: This mod brings back old alpha health, instant hearts from food and no hunger bar!
body:
Do you hate the hunger bar and thinking that beta 1.8 is the worst update? This mod for you!
What does it do:
Removed hunger bar
No food from cows, sheeps, chickens and zombies!
Instant regeneration from food
Just like in older versions!

The only food that heals you:
Pork, Cooked Pork, Mushroom Stew and Bread


How to install:
Put .jar file into /mods folder
Put No Food.zip file to /resourcepacks folder and then activate it!
